text_block_list.name: TV Celebrity
text_block_list.text: It's finally here! It's time for Derby Week!

text_block_list.name: TV Celebrity
text_block_list.text:
On this week's show, we'll be bringing you live
interviews with each of the competitors! We'll be
kicking things off with Ines Fujin! Can you hear
us?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yes! This is Ines Fujin, and I'm here with my
trainer!
choice_data_list: A pleasure to be on the show!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you certainly seem a little nervous there,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
But that's not surprising when your trainee is
competing in the Derby! Not to mention, her
track record indicates she has the talent to claim
victory!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
In all honesty, have you ever felt overwhelmed by
the responsibility on your shoulders?
choice_data_list: Not at all. I have complete confidence!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha. My trainer promised to lead me to victory
as the number one favorite!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty self-indulgent, to be fair. I've only been
able to make it this far because I have my trainer
and my family behind me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (That's why I believe in them!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(My family isn't particularly wealthy. To be
honest, I felt like I'd just be a burden on them if I
enrolled in the academy.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But Mom and Dad told me not worry, and my
little sisters cheered me on.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Even after all that, I still can't bring myself to
fully depend on their kindness.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I know I should concentrate more on my training,
but I want to keep working part-time to support
my sisters as they pursue their dreams.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Yet in spite of all that hassle, my trainer still
chose to accept me.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is truly amazing. So just sit back and
watch us achieve greatness.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When the two of us put our heads together, we're
unstoppable. Even if we get marked as the
favorites, I know we'll still pull through.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My dream right now is to win the Derby as the
number one favorite!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I wonder if I came on a little too strong
during the interview.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to lose after saying all that.
Heh-heh, are you ready for this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I've always believed that you'll win.
I've always believed that you'll win.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. I know you have faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm going to pour everything I have
into the race ahead of us!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whatever it takes to win!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Go Ines!
You can do it, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible atmosphere! We just received
confirmation that we've got an all-time record
number of spectators here for today's Derby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, Ines. This is our first race together since the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yes, and that was only a month ago.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I can see you've grown even more
dependable, Ryan. Each time we meet, it's like
you're a whole different person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You think so? ...Haha, well, it's an honor to hear
you say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You probably don't realize it, but you're the one
who brought me this far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I watched you, it helped me bring my own
dream into focus.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Your dream?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't let you win the Derby! No
matter how hard you try to break away, I'll
overtake you in the end!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Listen, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! Do your beeest!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's not gonna happen. I won't let you snatch
victory out of my grasp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well then, we'll just have to settle this on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, game on!
After all...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This isn't just my dream that I'm fighting for.
